free_text: Measurement of 107-MeV proton-induced
double-differential thick target neutron yields for
Fe, Pb, and Bi using a fixed-field alternating
gradient accelerator at Kyoto University
- Chemical-form of target is element.
- Physical-form of target is solid.
- Target-thickness: 30 mm
FFAG accelerator
S.W
Received from H.Iwamoto.
No information on source of uncertainties
